sentence_reviews.text: A joint distribution is factorized into a sequence of conditional next-step predictions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction, probability and generative modeling foundation; landing page lines 21-29 and 45-48.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is the standard chain-rule/autoregressive factorization.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Autoregressive / next-step prediction is modeled as depending on Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling and feeding downstream nodes such as Autoregressive decoding, Recurrent neural networks, Decoder-only causal transformers.
